signs.name: Dangerous curve
signs.meaning: The road curves and visibility may be limited. Slow down before the curve and be ready for oncoming traffic or obstacles.

signs.name: A1
signs.meaning: A1 (Warning—Dangerous curve) is a Swedish road sign belonging to category A (Warnings signs). Closer provisions are given in the road sign ordinance ( SFS 2007:90 ): The sign warns about a dangerous curve, and indicates the direction of said curve. The variant A1-2 indicates a curve to the right.

signs.name: A11
signs.meaning: A11 (Warning—Stone‐chips) is a Swedish road sign, belonging to the category of warning signs (group A). Closer provisions are given in the road sign ordinance ( SFS 2007:90 ): The sign warns about a risk of stone‐chips. The sign shall not be used on gravel roads or similar roads where stone‐chips are a common occurrence.

signs.name: A12
signs.meaning: A12 (Warning—Rockfall) is a Swedish road sign, belonging to the category of warning signs (group A). Closer provisions are given in the road sign ordinance ( SFS 2007:90 ): The sign warns about a risk of rockfall and indicates that rocks may be present on the road due to rockfall. The symbol shall be adjusted according to the local conditions of whichever place the sign has been mounted at. The variant A12-1 indicates that potential rockfall would come from the right side of the road.

signs.name: A12
signs.meaning: A12 (Warning—Rockfall) is a Swedish road sign, belonging to the category of warning signs (group A). Closer provisions are given in the road sign ordinance ( SFS 2007:90 ): The sign warns about a risk of rockfall and indicates that rocks may be present on the road due to rockfall. The symbol shall be adjusted according to the local conditions of whichever place the sign has been mounted at. The variant A12-2 indicates that potential rockfall would come from the left side of the road.

signs.name: A13
signs.meaning: A13 (Warning—Pedestrian crossing) is a Swedish road sign belonging to the category of warning signs (group A). No closer provisions are given in the road sign ordinance ( SFS 2007:90 ).

signs.name: A14
signs.meaning: A14 (Warning—Pedestrians) is a Swedish road sign, belonging to the category of warning signs (group A). Closer provisions are given in the road sign ordinance ( SFS 2007:90 ): The sign indicates a stretch of road where pedestrians often cross or are present on or near the road.

signs.name: Warning for children
signs.meaning: Warning for children. (The sign indicates a stretch of road where children often cross or stay on or by the road.)

signs.name: A16
signs.meaning: A16 (Warning—Cyclers and moped drivers) is a Swedish road sign, belonging to the category of warning signs (group A). Closer provisions are given in the road sign ordinance ( SFS 2007:90 ): The sign indicates a stretch of road where cyclers or moped drivers often cross or drive into the road.

signs.name: A17
signs.meaning: A17 (Warning—Skiers) is a Swedish road sign, belonging to the category of warning signs (group A). Closer provisions are given in the road sign ordinance ( SFS 2007:90 ): The sign indicates a place where skiers often cross or frequent the road.

signs.name: A18
signs.meaning: A18 (Warning—Riders) is a Swedish road sign, belonging to the category of warning signs (group A). Closer provisions are given in the road sign ordinance ( SFS 2007:90 ): The sign indicates a stretch of road where riders often cross or frequent the road.

signs.name: Warning for cattle
signs.meaning: Warning for cattle. (Sign A19 Warning for animals indicates a place or stretch of road where there is a special risk of animals on or by the road. Different symbols may appear on the sign.)

signs.name: Warning for horses
signs.meaning: Warning for horses. (Sign A19 Warning for animals indicates a place or stretch of road where there is a special risk of animals on or by the road. Different symbols may appear on the sign.)

signs.name: Warning for reindeer
signs.meaning: Warning for reindeer. (Sign A19 Warning for animals indicates a place or stretch of road where there is a special risk of animals on or by the road. Different symbols may appear on the sign.)

signs.name: Warning for sheep
signs.meaning: Warning for sheep. (Sign A19 Warning for animals indicates a place or stretch of road where there is a special risk of animals on or by the road. Different symbols may appear on the sign.)

signs.name: Warning for wild boar
signs.meaning: Warning for wild boar. (Sign A19 Warning for animals indicates a place or stretch of road where there is a special risk of animals on or by the road. Different symbols may appear on the sign.)

signs.name: A2
signs.meaning: A2 (Warning—Multiple dangerous curves) is a Swedish road sign belonging to category A (Warnings signs). Closer provisions are given in the road sign ordinance ( SFS 2007:90 ): The sign warns about multiple dangerous curves, and indicates the direction of the first dangerous curve. The variant A2-1 indicates that the first curve is to the left.

signs.name: A2
signs.meaning: A2 (Warning—Multiple dangerous curves) is a Swedish road sign belonging to category A (Warnings signs). Closer provisions are given in the road sign ordinance ( SFS 2007:90 ): The sign warns about multiple dangerous curves, and indicates the direction of the first dangerous curve. The variant A2-2 indicates that the first curve is to the right.

signs.name: A23
signs.meaning: A23 (Warning—Low flying aeroplanes) is a Swedish road sign, belonging to the category of warning signs (group A). No closer provisions are given in the road sign ordinance ( SFS 2007:90 ).

signs.name: A23
signs.meaning: A23 (Warning—Low flying aeroplanes) is a Swedish road sign, belonging to the category of warning signs (group A). No closer provisions are given in the road sign ordinance ( SFS 2007:90 ).

signs.name: A24
signs.meaning: A24 (Warning—Side wind) is a Swedish road sign belonging to the category of warning signs (group A). Closer provisions are given in the road sign ordinance ( SFS 2007:90 ): The sign indicates a stretch of road where strong side wind is a common occurrence. The symbol shall be adjusted according to the local conditions of whichever place the sign has been mounted at. The variant A24-1 indicates that potential side wind would come from the right.

signs.name: A24
signs.meaning: A24 (Warning—Side wind) is a Swedish road sign belonging to the category of warning signs (group A). Closer provisions are given in the road sign ordinance ( SFS 2007:90 ): The sign indicates a stretch of road where strong side wind is a common occurrence. The symbol shall be adjusted according to the local conditions of whichever place the sign has been mounted at. The variant A24-2 indicates that potential side wind would come from the left.

signs.name: Warning for oncoming traffic
signs.meaning: Warning for oncoming traffic. (The sign indicates that a carriageway with one-way traffic turns into a carriageway with traffic in both directions.)

signs.name: Warning for a tunnel
signs.meaning: Warning for a tunnel.

signs.name: A27
signs.meaning: A27 (Warning—Weak road edge or high carriageway edge) is a Swedish road sign belonging to the category of warning signs (group A). No closer provisions are given in the road sign ordinance ( SFS 2007:90 ).

signs.name: A3
signs.meaning: A3 (Warning—Descent) is a Swedish road sign belonging to category A (Warnings signs). Closer provisions are given in the road sign ordinance ( SFS 2007:90 ): The sign warns about a steep descent. The number indicates the gradient as a percentage and shall be adjusted according to the local conditions.

signs.name: Warning for a railway crossing with barriers
signs.meaning: Warning for a railway crossing with barriers. (The sign indicates a level crossing with a railway or tramway where there are safety barriers.)

signs.name: Warning for a railway crossing without barriers
signs.meaning: Warning for a railway crossing without barriers. (The sign indicates a level crossing with a railway or tramway where there are no safety barriers.)

signs.meaning: Sweden road sign: Warning signs - Korsning med spårväg

signs.name: Intersection
signs.meaning: Intersection with another road. Be prepared for cross traffic and adjust your speed.

signs.name: Sweden road sign: Warning signs - Varning för olycka
signs.meaning: Sweden road sign: Warning signs - Varning för olycka .

signs.name: A5
signs.meaning: A5 (Warning—Narrowing road) is a Swedish road sign belonging to category A (Warnings signs). Closer provisions are given in the road sign ordinance ( SFS 2007:90 ): The sign indicates that the road or path narrows. The symbol shall be adjusted according to the local conditions. The variant A5-1 indicates that the road or path narrows from both sides.

signs.name: A5
signs.meaning: A5 (Warning—Narrowing road) is a Swedish road sign belonging to category A (Warnings signs). Closer provisions are given in the road sign ordinance ( SFS 2007:90 ): The sign indicates that the road or path narrows. The symbol shall be adjusted according to the local conditions. The variant A5-2 indicates that the road or path narrows from the right.

signs.name: A5
signs.meaning: A5 (Warning—Narrowing road) is a Swedish road sign belonging to category A (Warnings signs). Closer provisions are given in the road sign ordinance ( SFS 2007:90 ): The sign indicates that the road or path narrows. The symbol shall be adjusted according to the local conditions. The variant A5-3 indicates that the road or path narrows from the left.

signs.name: A6
signs.meaning: A6 (Warning—Bridge) is a Swedish road sign belonging to the category of warning signs (group A). Closer provisions are given in the road sign ordinance ( SFS 2007:90 ): The sign warns about an opening bridge.

signs.name: A7
signs.meaning: A7 (Warning—Quay) is a Swedish road sign, belonging to the category of warning signs (group A). Closer provisions are given in the road sign ordinance ( SFS 2007:90 ): The sign indicates a place where the road ends against water.

signs.name: A8
signs.meaning: A8 (Warning—Uneven road) is a Swedish road sign, belonging to the category of warning signs (group A). Closer provisions are given in the road sign ordinance ( SFS 2007:90 ): The sign indicates that the roadway is uneven or damaged to such a degree that it is appropriate to travel at a lower speed than would otherwise have been the case.

signs.name: A9
signs.meaning: A9 (Warning—Speed impediment) is a common designation for two Swedish road signs which belong to the category of warning signs (group A). Closer provisions are given in the road sign ordinance ( SFS 2007:90 ): The signs warn about bumps or dips which have been installed as a speed reduction measure. The variant A9-1 indicates (a) bump(s).

signs.name: A9
signs.meaning: A9 (Warning—Speed impediment) is a common designation for two Swedish road signs which belong to the category of warning signs (group A). Closer provisions are given in the road sign ordinance ( SFS 2007:90 ): The signs warn about bumps or dips which have been installed as a speed reduction measure. The variant A9-2 indicates (a) dip(s).
